scope: Gemma4 JANG/MXFP audio capability honesty and bundled runtime parity
root_cause: Current source correctly requires Gemma4/Gemma4 unified audio to be weight-backed by audio_tower.* weights, but bundled/staged app runtime copies were stale and still advertised gemma4_unified audio from audio_config alone. That allowed installed-app chat audio requests to enter generation and decode base64 audio instead of returning the unsupported-modality guard.

fix.source_logic: No fake audio support was added. Source still gates Gemma4 audio on actual audio_tower.* weights and MXFP audio remains off unless explicitly experimental.

bundled_route_probe.detail: /v1/chat/completions received unsupported media modality audio. Supported modalities: text, vision.

boundaries: This does not claim Gemma4 audio works.
This does not claim N2 audio works.
This does not sign, notarize, publish, upload, or release anything.
This only makes source, bundled Python, and staged app runtime copies agree that unsupported audio is rejected.
